productDisplayName: Nike Men Revolution White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for absolute comfort, the nike Revolution MSL running shoe is stylish and comfortable. It's stylish upper makes it a great lifestyle footwear.UpperHeavily meshed upper for breathable comfort, with synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with flex grooves for ease of movementWaffle-pattern lugs for grip and tractionScooped heel for extra cushioning to the back-footShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
